---
title: "Slides"
---

<p align="center">
<iframe src="slides/slides.html"></iframe>
</p>

You can also <a href="https://nrennie.rbind.io/r-medicine-2026-parameterized-reports/slides/slides.html" target="_blank">open these slides in a new tab</a>.

To save a copy of these slides as a PDF:

* Click <a href="https://nrennie.rbind.io/r-medicine-2026-parameterized-reports/slides/slides.html" target="_blank">open these slides in a new tab</a>.

* Press `e` on your keyboard.

* Print as a PDF.
